# [Clang] Assertion `!CodeSynthesisContexts.empty()' failed` in `clang::Sema::getCurLambda(bool)`

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176392

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 20.1.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/eq8hz5fGq
Maybe related to #176045, but this one goes back to 20.1.

## Program
```cpp
template <int BITS> struct FingerprintTable;
int main() {
  [] { template <int BITS> FingerprintTable<BITS>:: };
}
```
